productDisplayName: Hush Puppies Men Formal Brown Shoes
description: Simple and stylish, this oxford from hush puppies adds that casual zing to your semi-formal wear. Wear it with crisp semi-formals and classy accessories for heightened style. Upper Leather upper for comfort and style Lacing system for a snug, customised Fit Mildly padded tongue and collar with a leather inner for breathable comfort Padded footbed for all-day comfort Midsole EVA midsole for impact protection Outsole TPU outsole with textured TPR units in the forefoot and heel for absolute grip and traction shoe care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner if needed Do not store in direct sunlight
